recommendations.title: Separation
recommendations.overview: A young girl finds solace in her artist father and the ghost of her dead mother.

recommendations.title: Brahms: The Boy II
recommendations.overview: After a family moves into the Heelshire Mansion, their young son soon makes friends with a life-like doll called Brahms.

recommendations.title: Wer
recommendations.overview: A defense attorney begins to suspect that her client, who is charged with the murders of a vacationing family, might be more than meets the eye.

recommendations.title: Orphan: First Kill
recommendations.overview: After escaping from an Estonian psychiatric facility, Leena Klammer travels to America by impersonating Esther, the missing daughter of a wealthy family. But when her mask starts to slip, she is put against a mother who will protect her family from t

recommendations.title: The Boy
recommendations.overview: A young American woman takes a job as a nanny in a remote English village, soon discovering that the family's eight-year-old son is a life-sized doll that comes with a list of strict rules.

recommendations.title: Lord of Misrule
recommendations.overview: When the daughter of the town's new priest goes missing during the harvest festival, a desperate search begins, uncovering the town's dark history and resurfacing tales of a mysterious, malevolent spirit that demands sacrifice.

recommendations.title: Stay Alive
recommendations.overview: After the brutal death of a friend, a group of friends find themselves in possession of a video-game called "Stay Alive," a blood-curdling true story of a 17th century noblewoman known as the Blood Countess. After playing the game when they know they

recommendations.title: When Evil Lurks
recommendations.overview: When brothers Pedro and Jimi discover that a demonic infection has been festering in a nearby farmhouse, they attempt to evict the victim from their land. Failing to adhere to the proper rites of exorcism, their reckless actions inadvertently trigger

recommendations.title: Bad Day for the Cut
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged Irish farmer, who still lives at home with his mother, sets off on a mission of revenge when the old lady is murdered.

recommendations.title: The Grapes of Death
recommendations.overview: A young woman discovers that the pesticide being sprayed on vineyards is turning people into murderous lunatics.
